What is a gene variant and how do variants occur? 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/genetics/understanding/mutationsanddisorders/genemutation/ 
What is a gene variant and how do variants occur? 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
A gene variant is a permanent change in the DNA sequence that makes up a gene. This type of genetic change used to be known as a gene mutation, but because changes in DNA do not always cause disease, it
